title: GPTQ/AWQ/HQQ integration tests against real HF checkpoints
description: Spun out from #613 partial close. The synthetic tests in quant_loaders.rs validate unpacker correctness, but a full integration test loads e.g. TheBloke/Llama-2-7B-GPTQ from the HF Hub via ferrotorch-hub::hf_download_model and verifies that the unpacked weights produce the same output as the reference HF transformers + auto_gptq pipeline on a fixed prompt. Requires network access + ~4 GB cache; skip in CI unless an explicit feature flag is set.
